title: Today's AI Brief: AI grifters are creating fake Black people to sell Shein junk
summary: AI grifters create fake Black people to sell cheap products, a founder bets on the old school web, and more.

body.text: A Bet on the Old School Web

In a more positive story, a founder named Craig Campbell walked away from a 'blank check' to start a simple website. His bet on the 'old school web' seems to be paying off. I find it refreshing to see someone succeeding with a straightforward approach, no AI-powered magic required. It's a nice reminder that sometimes, the old ways can still be the best.

How one founder’s bet on ‘the old school web’ is paying off, from theverge.com, is also worth a quick mention.
